backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two button link updates in CallToAction and Hero components to point to an ai.studio demo URL.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing a Cariesrisk AI promotional website with React components, styling, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, establishing a dental-themed design system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React application with title 'Cariesrisk AI' and mounts to root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full page layout with Header, Hero, Features, About, CallToAction, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component explaining Cariesrisk AI's mission with a benefits list and decorative tooth character image.
frontend/src/components/CallToAction.tsx: CTA section with 'Request a Demo' button linking to ai.studio demo URL and 'Contact Sales' button, plus feature highlights.
frontend/src/components/Features.tsx: Features section displaying six cards with icons and descriptions highlighting AI analysis, risk assessment, and preventive care capabilities.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with logo, navigation links, company info, and caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with Cariesrisk AI logo, navigation menu for Features/About/Contact sections, and stethoscope icon.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with headline, 'Get Started' button linking to ai.studio demo, statistics cards, and gradient background.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor for backend communication, using Internet Identity and React Query with automatic invalidation of dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file reserved for future React Query hooks for backend integration; currently empty with no implemented queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a mint green and white dental-themed color palette for both light and dark modes, including sidebar, chart, and UI component colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), border radius variables, shadows, and animation keyframes for accordions and other UI elements.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking two completed features that update demo and get-started button links to an AI Studio app URL, with no active feature requests or known issues.
